name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers car title loans, secured flex lines of credit, and unsecured personal lines of credit with same-day funding and most credit types accepted.
description_long:
TitleMax is a national title lending company with a broad footprint across the South and Midwest. The Memphis Summer Avenue location has been serving local residents since February 2007, and is one of at least nine TitleMax branches within the greater Memphis area alone — indicating significant scale and operational longevity in the title lending market. The company operates both in-store and online channels, depending on the product type.

TitleMax offers three distinct credit products at this location. The primary offering is a car title pledge, a secured loan that uses the customer's vehicle title as collateral in lieu of relying solely on credit score. Alongside this, the store offers a flex line of credit — a secured revolving credit facility that allows customers to draw funds up to a set limit, either all at once or incrementally over time. A third product, an unsecured flexible line of credit, is available both in-store and online for customers in approved states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI). All three products are marketed for emergency or unexpected expenses.

Several features set TitleMax apart within the title loan segment. Despite conducting a credit check, TitleMax accepts most credit types — the vehicle's value supplements the underwriting, making approval accessible to borrowers who would be declined elsewhere. Customers retain use of their vehicle throughout the loan term. The Summer Avenue location offers bilingual service. Google reviews for this branch average 5.0 out of 5 across 481 reviews, with recurring praise for specific staff members by name — an indication of consistent in-store service quality. Same-day cash is a stated feature for qualifying applicants.

Honestly, TitleMax operates in a high-cost lending segment. Title loans carry meaningful risk: borrowers who cannot repay may face vehicle repossession, which can compound financial hardship. The website does not disclose APR or representative interest rates for any of its products — a significant transparency gap that consumers should investigate before applying. Online personal loan availability is restricted to eleven states. Title loans themselves require a clear vehicle title, excluding borrowers who still owe on their car. TitleMax is a practical option for car owners with poor credit who need fast cash, but borrowers should compare total cost carefully.
pros: Same-day cash available for qualifying applicants on title pledge and flex line of credit
Accepts most credit types — vehicle title value supplements credit score in underwriting
Customers keep driving their vehicle while the title loan is active
Offers three distinct products: title pledge, secured flex line of credit, and unsecured personal line of credit
Both in-store and online application options available for unsecured line of credit
Bilingual service available at this location
5.0/5 average Google rating from 481+ reviews with consistent named-staff praise
cons: No APR or interest rate information disclosed on the website — cost of borrowing is opaque
Vehicle title required as collateral for title loans; non-repayment risks vehicle repossession
Online personal loan only available in 11 states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Clear vehicle title required — borrowers with existing auto loans are ineligible for title products
Closed Sundays, and Saturday hours end at 4:00 pm — limited weekend access
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear title who need same-day cash and have poor or thin credit
Memphis-area residents who prefer in-person service with bilingual support
Borrowers in approved states seeking an unsecured revolving line of credit with flexible draw terms
Consumers who have been declined by traditional lenders and need emergency funds quickly
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for car owners with a clear title and poor credit who need fast access to cash and cannot qualify for traditional personal loans. The main caveat is significant: APR is not disclosed on the website, title loans are among the highest-cost consumer credit products available, and failure to repay puts the borrower's vehicle at risk.
services: Secured flex line of credit (revolving, draw as needed)
Unsecured flexible line of credit (in-store and online)
Credit check with alternative underwriting using vehicle value
